identity: Human female dragon knight, young adult, shoulder-length straight orange hair, gray-blue eyes, calm focused face.
outfit: Full dark green dragon-scale helm with two small curving red horns and an orange crest, matching dark green dragon-scale plate armor covering the torso, shoulders, and arms.
weapons: A dragon-shaped iron warhammer — the head sculpted as a stylized gray dragon with glowing orange eyes — held across the back or in the left hand. A single-edged steel longsword drawn in the right hand, worn leather grip.
attackStyle: East-facing. Longsword raised overhead in the right hand, warhammer lowered in the left, mid-swing, dragon-scale armor gleaming.
spellStyle: East-facing. Longsword planted point-down, left hand raised with the dragon warhammer held high, the dragon-head glowing orange with fire breath wisps.
blockStyle: East-facing. Longsword held vertically in front of the body in the right hand, warhammer held horizontally in the left as a second guard, visor down.
koStyle: East-facing, on one knee, both sword and dragon warhammer dropped in front of her, visored head bowed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), armored idle. Longsword in the right hand at her side, dragon warhammer resting in the left hand, horned helm clearly visible.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Dark green dragon-scale helm with two small red horns and an orange crest, orange hair spilling below the helm, dark green scale armor, gray dragon-head warhammer over the left shoulder, steel longsword visible on the right.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female dragon knight, young adult, shoulder-length straight orange hair, gray-blue eyes, calm focused face.

OUTFIT: Full dark green dragon-scale helm with two small curving red horns and an orange crest, matching dark green dragon-scale plate armor covering the torso, shoulders, and arms.

WEAPONS: A dragon-shaped iron warhammer — the head sculpted as a stylized gray dragon with glowing orange eyes — held across the back or in the left hand. A single-edged steel longsword drawn in the right hand, worn leather grip.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female dragon knight, young adult, shoulder-length straight orange hair, gray-blue eyes, calm focused face.

OUTFIT: Full dark green dragon-scale helm with two small curving red horns and an orange crest, matching dark green dragon-scale plate armor covering the torso, shoulders, and arms.

WEAPONS: A dragon-shaped iron warhammer — the head sculpted as a stylized gray dragon with glowing orange eyes — held across the back or in the left hand. A single-edged steel longsword drawn in the right hand, worn leather grip.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Dark green dragon-scale helm with two small red horns and an orange crest, orange hair spilling below the helm, dark green scale armor, gray dragon-head warhammer over the left shoulder, steel longsword visible on the right.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
